case_title: JEFFREY M SAARMAN VS. 1083 CLAY STREET CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION,

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIF JEFFREY M. SAARMAN & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE VERNON KORDAHL, MEMBER OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS AT 1083 CLAY STREET CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' ASSOCIATION. TERESA FERRARI, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
